content.content: Alice's mouse is broken. Could you rebuy the same mouse I purchased last time? Please apply my available discount and send the invoice to her email at alice.miller@gmail.com.

Next, I will retrieve any available discounts, checkout the product while applying the discount, obtain the invoice for the order, and finally send the invoice to Alice's email. 
</function_thought>
